delegation_scope: bounded drafting and validation assistance only
manipulation_risk: low; no persuasion or dependency-shaping authority
reversibility: reversible through git revert before publication
material_usability: direct review interface is available in the shared repository before merge
timing_requirement: maintainer review is available before merge and before any reader-release effect
appeal_channel: maintainer override or issue review can change the plan before publication
shutdown_or_rollback_path: stop the goal or revert the committed change
residual_dependency_risk: Residual risk is limited to local drafting dependence and remains visible in review.
